tasks.title: 🎯 Welcome to Mission Control
tasks.description:
Your Kanban board is ready!

**Your columns:**
• Backlog → Ideas and upcoming work
• InProgress → Currently being worked on
• in review → Completed, awaiting your approval
• done → Finished and approved

**How to use:**
1. Create tasks in Backlog
2. Drag to InProgress when ready to work
3. I get notified and start working
4. I move to in review when done
5. You review and move to done (or back for fixes)
